Metadata.SourceFile: Ski Run (Commodore Disk User - Issue #1 - Side A).d64
Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x2000 "SKIRUN-2000" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Ski Run.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
This game has a BASIC title program loaded at $0801. Therefore an init routine has been added at $2000 which: 1. Sets up the correct VICII settings and necessary BASIC pointers. 2. Disables the RUN/STOP key by modifying the STOP vector by setting $FE at $0328. 3. Executes the RUN command to start the command to start the game program.
As the original game is frozen, the breakpoint to use for dumping is actually $A7AE.
Note: The FOR loop on line 43 has been reduced from 100 loops to 20 in order to decrease the delay on the title screen.
